pom.xml.general_idea: Include Spring Security starter to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Firebase Admin SDK for server-side Firebase integration.
Add JavaMail API dependency to support sending emails.
Add Java Activation Framework dependency required by JavaMail.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in entities and DTOs.
Add MapStruct dependency for type-safe bean mapping.

.gitignore.general_idea: Explicitly include IntelliJ code style configurations in version control while ignoring other IDE metadata.
Exclude local application properties from version control to prevent committing environment-specific settings.
Exclude Firebase admin SDK JSON credentials from version control to prevent leaking sensitive service account keys.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Replace hardcoded database URL with an environment variable placeholder for security and deployment flexibility.
Replace hardcoded database username with an environment variable placeholder.
Replace hardcoded database password with an environment variable placeholder.
Add configuration property to load Google Application Credentials from an environment variable.
Add configuration property to load SMTP user credentials from an environment variable for logging/mail.
Add configuration property to load SMTP password credentials from an environment variable for logging/mail.
